goal: Visit the provided public company website for the competitor candidate and extract a structured competitive profile. Identify the company name, homepage URL, a concise company summary, the primary market category, sector, geography, target customers, core products or services, visible differentiators, visible pricing or packaging signals, and supporting evidence URLs. Do not invent claims that are not visible on the site. Return facts that help compare Adyen N.V. in a competitor landscape.
goal_prompt:
Visit the provided public company website for the competitor candidate and extract a structured competitive profile. Identify the company name, homepage URL, a concise company summary, the primary market category, sector, geography, target customers, core products or services, visible differentiators, visible pricing or packaging signals, and supporting evidence URLs. Do not invent claims that are not visible on the site. Return facts that help compare Adyen N.V. in a competitor landscape.

Return only structured JSON that matches this schema exactly:
{"type":"object","required":["captured_at","company_name","homepage_url","summary","market_category","sector","geography","target_customers","products","differentiators","pricing_signals","evidence_urls"],"properties":{"captured_at":{"type":"string"},"company_name":{"type":"string"},"homepage_url":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"},"market_category":{"type":"string"},"sector":{"type":"string"},"geography":{"type":"string"},"target_customers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"products":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","category","summary"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"category":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"}}}},"differentiators":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"pricing_signals":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"evidence_urls":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}}

Stop conditions:
["Stop after the homepage and up to two visibly linked product, solutions, or pricing pages have been reviewed.","Stop after eight relevant visible sections have been extracted.","Stop after two consecutive navigation or parsing failures."]

Structured error handling rules:
{"timeout":{"action":"retry","max_retries":2,"emit_status":"failed"},"layout_changed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"failed"},"schema_validation_failed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"validation_error"}}
stop_conditions: Stop after the homepage and up to two visibly linked product, solutions, or pricing pages have been reviewed.
Stop after eight relevant visible sections have been extracted.
Stop after two consecutive navigation or parsing failures.

result.summary: Adyen is a global financial technology platform that provides an end-to-end solution for payments, data, and financial management. Its single-platform architecture allows businesses to accept payments across online, mobile, and in-store channels while providing unified data insights and financial tools.
result.geography: Global; headquartered in Amsterdam with 29+ offices across North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, and Latin America.

products.name: Accept Payments
products.summary: A global, omnichannel payment processing solution for online, in-app, and in-person transactions.

products.name: Payouts
products.summary: Service for sending fast, global payouts to partners, users, or vendors in real-time.

products.name: Adyen for Platforms
products.summary: An integrated solution for marketplaces and SaaS providers to embed payments and financial products into their user experience.

products.name: Issuing
products.summary: Enables businesses to create and manage their own virtual and physical payment card programs.

products.name: Risk Management (Protect)
products.summary: AI-powered fraud prevention and risk assessment tools to optimize authorization rates and reduce chargebacks.

products.name: Authentication
products.summary: Optimized 3D Secure 2 and regulatory compliance solutions for secure transaction authentication.

differentiators: Single platform architecture (no legacy redirects or fragmented third-party integrations)
Unified Commerce (integrated data across online and offline sales channels)
Full-stack control (owns the gateway, risk management, and acquiring licenses)
Global reach with local acquiring expertise in major markets
High platform reliability with a 99.999% uptime track record
pricing_signals: Interchange++ pricing model for transparent cost tracking
Fixed processing fee of $0.13 per transaction
No setup fees or monthly subscription fees
Pay-per-transaction variable fees depending on the payment method used
Custom pricing available for enterprise-level volume
